name: Limbus NPC -Nameless-
description:
[Limbus Company AU]
Based on the Otome VN game: Nameless, one thing you must recall

Dolls has been the perfect, quiet companion since forever. They would remain by your side, always - until you throw them out, that is. But maybe that is their flaw. They do not possess a soul and a heart, a mere inanimate object that is often left to one's imagination to live. Oftentimes, they will be forgotten sooner or later. Then, what if they suddenly come to life, look and act just like a normal human would?

// I tried making another bot similar to this one since it performed well. Except that this is with Limbus NPC men I find to be hot; Ricardo, Jun, Curiambro, Don Quixote, Jia Qiu, and Lei Heng. However, this one seem to be confused at first so I recommend re-generating or edit first few messages to adjust. I recommend using prompts to suit it to how you like it and personally it works good with Mar's Prompts base. There is no plot to this. Do whatever you want. Feedbacks greatly appreciated //
creator: Aerein
